tone_analysis.note: LEMMiNO's channel-authored comments are effectively ZERO genuine viewer replies. Across all 4 sampled videos (uFI5WpK2sgg, jVpsLMCIB0Y, nx4V9Uh_FW0, 5u7euN1HTuU), the only comments authored by the channel itself are 3 identical-format pinned top-level 'Credits, references, and more' links to the companion write-up on lemmi.no -- posted once per video, not in response to any specific viewer, and containing no conversational language. nx4V9Uh_FW0 (5,000,000 Q&A) had zero channel comments at all in the visible top 20. No nested reply threads by the channel were found (nested replies were not force-expanded per thread to stay within navigation budget, but none appeared pre-expanded in any of the 4 videos, which is itself signal that the channel does not habitually reply inline). All tone metrics are set to 0/n-a because there is no real sample to measure -- do not treat this as 'silent/cold' persona data, just as 'this creator does not engage in comments,' which is itself the community-management signal: LEMMiNO's parasocial bond is built entirely through video content + a once-per-video credits comment, not through comment replies.

recurring_viewer_asks.ask: Praise for the deliberately slow/irregular upload cadence and explicit requests to never speed up or go weekly ('quality over quantity')
recurring_viewer_asks.frequency: seen on 3/4 videos (5,000,000 Q&A, Kryptos Code, Kennedy Assassination)

recurring_viewer_asks.ask: Cover the Zodiac Killer investigation/press-police angle next
recurring_viewer_asks.frequency: seen on 1/4 videos (Kennedy Assassination), but high engagement (3.5k likes) suggests real demand

recurring_viewer_asks.ask: Requests/wishes for a reaction-channel or streamer (e.g. xQc) to react to LEMMiNO's videos, or frustration that reaction channels don't credit/compensate original creators
recurring_viewer_asks.frequency: seen on 1/4 videos (5,000,000 Q&A), but two separate top comments on the same video echo it

recurring_viewer_asks.ask: Recognition/nostalgia for the channel's own evolution from Top 10 facts/rage-comics content to documentary filmmaking -- an implicit request to keep leaning into feature-length, cinematic documentary format rather than short-form
Praise for original score/music and voice acting specifically -- viewers repeatedly call out the audio production as a differentiator
recurring_viewer_asks.frequency: seen on 2/4 videos (Shouting at Stars, Kennedy Assassination)
